skills.name: @jwt-auth
guidelines: Implement JWT issuance and verification
Use refresh tokens endpoint /refresh
Store only hashed passwords; never plaintext

skills.name: @secure-password
guidelines: Use bcrypt hashing or passlib (Python) with strong cost
Add password reset flow with time-bound tokens
Enforce minimum password strength

skills.name: @rate-limiting
guidelines: Add per-IP rate limits to auth endpoints
Return 429 on abuse and log events

skills.name: @fastapi-best-practices
guidelines: Structure code: backend/app/main.py, backend/app/routes/*.py, backend/app/models/*.py
Use Pydantic models for request/response validation
Enable CORS appropriately for frontend

skills.name: @postgres-best-practices
guidelines: Use SQLAlchemy or async equivalent with connection pooling
Store DSN in environment, do not hardcode secrets
Add migrations folder and migration script

skills.name: @migrations
guidelines: Create migrations directory with versioned scripts
Add initial schema migration for users/auth tables

skills.name: @react-forms
guidelines: Use controlled inputs and handle async submit
Show validation and error states clearly

skills.name: @tailwind-setup
guidelines: Configure Tailwind and use utility classes for layout
Ensure responsive design for auth and dashboard pages
